Course Title: Dynamic Pricing with AI: Fairness and Transparency Risks
Category: Hospitality & Tourism: Hotels, Tourism, Travel Agencies, Food & Beverage
Who is this for: Revenue managers, pricing analysts, hotel managers, restaurant managers, travel agency managers, marketing managers, customer service managers, operations managers
Team or Dept this is for: Revenue Management, Marketing, Operations, Customer Service, Legal, Compliance
Description: When pricing models create customer backlash.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with pricing strategies and a general interest in how technology is shaping the hospitality and tourism industry are all you need to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key fairness and transparency risks associated with AI-driven dynamic pricing in hospitality and tourism settings, and explain how these risks can lead to customer backlash and reputational harm. You will also apply practical strategies to communicate pricing decisions more openly, helping your organisation build trust and reduce the likelihood of negative customer reactions.
